name: aitest-kit
description: Codex workflows for AITest Kit: initialize workspaces, generate tests, run reports, and explain failures without duplicating the CLI core.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and run maintainable tests from docs
interface.longDescription: AITest Kit guides Codex users from project or API documents to test knowledge, Markdown cases, generated pytest, structured reports, failure triage, and rule promotion review. The plugin is a thin workflow layer over the aitest-kit CLI.
defaultPrompt: Initialize AITest Kit for this project
Review my API docs for test readiness
Build AITest knowledge from my docs
Design AITest Markdown cases for a module
Generate pytest from my AITest Markdown cases
Analyze passing tests for rule promotion
Teach me this project with lesson notes
